creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
For example: 

> Subject: Bouncing messages from freebsd-questions@FreeBSD.org

> Hi, this is the Mlmmj program managing the <freebsd-questions@FreeBSD.org>
> mailing list.
> 
> Some messages to you could not be delivered. If you're seeing this
> message it means things are back to normal, and it's merely for your
> information.
> 
> Here is the list of the bounced messages:
> - 3982

Realistically: how can a recipient know, from a number alone, what bounced? 

Is it possible to show, maybe, the subject line, date and time (UTC) of what bounced?

TIA
